tests.test_name: Download format extension matches selected format
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Ensures the user starts on the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user downloads a coverage result derived from an uploaded story file and verifies the downloaded file carries the correct extension for each supported format.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is displayed from an uploaded story file
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks the Download MD button

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is displayed from an uploaded story file
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks the Download HTML button

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is displayed from an uploaded story file
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks the Download JSON button

tests.test_name: Download filename falls back to date-time when story is pasted
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)

test_hooks.name: Given I am on the Story Coverage page
test_hooks.explanation: Ensures the user starts on the Story Coverage page before each scenario runs.

tests.journey: A user who pasted story content rather than uploading a file downloads a coverage result and verifies the filename falls back to a date-time-stamped pattern instead of a story-derived name.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Download filename falls back to date-time when story is pasted
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A coverage result is displayed with no uploaded story file (pasted input)
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks the Download MD button
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Downloaded filename matches the regex pattern shiftdoc-tca-\d{8}-\d{6}\.md
